meaning: n.零售adj.零售的vt.零售,转述vi.零售adv.以零售方式
examples: The retail division is BT's cash cow.
Retail sales fell in November by 10%.
They have tried to reinvent their retail stores.
Scottish Retail Consortium (SRC) footfall figures show numbers increased by 1% compared to a year ago.
The former Marks and Spencer chairman says he started out selling pyjamas at the retail giant.
